title: 祭りはひとりじゃできやしねえ

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days have passed since Inari One's
interview was broadcast on TV. She's been
pouring herself into training, as she always does.
However...
choice_data_list: (Is it really okay to leave things like this?)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One's goal to reach the top of the regionals
was born from her love of Oi.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But her intentions could go to waste if she does
nothing to settle the discord between her and
Chief—or I could say, between her and all of Oi
itself.
choice_data_list: (I just can't sit by and watch!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Another day later... Without notifying Inari One, I
decide to make a trip all the way to Oi
Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! I know you, you're Inari's trainer! Did ya
come alone today?
choice_data_list: I wanted to speak with Chief...

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text:
Chief? Sure, just gimme a sec.
Chief, you have a gueeest!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
For goodness' sake! Ya don't gotta scream at me
to get my—wait, it's you...
choice_data_list: I want to talk to you about Inari.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to him why Inari One wants to compete
in the regionals and her long-term goal.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
She wants to proudly declare that the regionals
aren't a step below the centrals... by reachin' the
top of both of 'em?

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: Geez, she's a real piece of work.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Gotta go 'n' make things hard for me, doesn't
she? But I'll agree to what she's tryna do.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't mean I've forgiven her, though... I accept
it, but I don't like it one bit!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Sorry if I'm buttin' in, Trainer, but I trust you'll let
me come back to the academy with ya. I got a few
words to exchange with that girl.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I gotta run even more. Otherwise, I don't have a
chance of beatin' anyone from Oi!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Well, will ya look at that! Good to know you're
puttin' some heart into your trainin', Inari!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Uh... Huh?! Chief?! What're ya doin' here?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Don't tell me...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Why'd ya go and bring him here?!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: Watch your mouth, brat!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Your trainer came lookin' for me outta grave
concern over your situation.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
So don't go actin' shocked... That wouldn't be
fittin' for an Oi girl.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Inari. I know what you're tryna do. I fully
understand, but...

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
I don't like it. No, I don't like it one bit! What're
ya doin' actin' so stupid?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I know... I can't defend myself on this one. I'm
goin' against what ya told me by runnin' in the
regionals instead of the centrals.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: Forget that crap! I'm not worried about that at all!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
I wanna know why ya won't stand tall and say
you're aimin' for the top.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I-I mean, I can't just say somethin' like that...
'Specially knowin' how strong everyone in Oi is.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: Ya see?! That's exactly what I don't like!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
You're tryna act all tough, but you're nothin' but
a scaredy-cat! If it's the top you want, come at us
with your head held high, fair and square!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Or are ya plannin' to mosey your way up to the
top without givin' us a chance to fight? I tell ya,
this idiot!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
What's the top even mean for ya in the first
place?!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Quit thinkin' you're the only one who knows the
right thing to do.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
You're not the only one on this journey, you
know. Yet here ya are, ignorin' your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Sounds to me like your time here at Tracen has
made you forget something important, Inari.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: And that's... that ya can't put on a festival alone.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: All right, lemme cut to the chase...

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: Central racer Inari One, listen up and listen good!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
I, as representative of Oi, accept your challenge!
But just so you know...

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: We're the ones who're gonna stand at the top!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Chief. I really appreciate ya...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm Inari One, and I'm makin' this statement right
here! With all my body 'n' soul, I will stand
victorious on the grounds of Oi...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: And take the top of the regionals!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: So when that time comes, get ready to rumble!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: Heh! Right back atcha.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
If you wanna reach the top so bad, come and get
it, ya big dummy.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
...Trainer, I'll be takin' my leave now. Thank ya for
arrangin' my visit.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
See ya, Inari. Ya better bulk up good. We're a
strong bunch.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I know that...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: That's what makes gettin' to the top worthwhile!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Thanks for today, Boss.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Thanks for today, Boss.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: And... I'm sorry I made ya worry for nothin'.
choice_data_list:
No, I'm sorry for forcing the conversation on
you.

No, I'm sorry for forcing the conversation on
you.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's all water under the bridge now! Let's turn
over a new leaf. 'Cause I really learned somethin'
today.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I made up my own ideas about how Chief felt...
and I pushed forward not knowin' how you felt.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I ran off 'cause I couldn't face things head-on. I
was so selfish... But that sorry act ends here!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
From now on, I'll speak my mind and stand proud!
I'm gonna fight through the whole of Oi till I take
the top!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: And to do that... I'll be needin' your help!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: And to do that... I'll be needin' your help!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm relieved to see the discord between Inari One
and Chief has finally been resolved. This whole
incident serves as a good reminder that the bond
she has with her hometown is an unbreakable one.
